message:
feat(random): add random_loggam and rewrite Poisson with PTRS algorithm

Add random_loggam() matching NumPy's SPECFUN-based log-gamma for use in
Poisson and negative binomial sampling. Rewrite Poisson distribution to
use PTRS (Poisson Transformed Rejection with Squeeze) algorithm for
lambda >= 10, matching NumPy's random_poisson exactly. Fix negative
binomial to use the corrected Poisson + gamma composition.

Update FEATURE_PARITY.md with accurate test counts (fnp-random 178,
fnp-conformance 134) and description of all 39 oracle-verified
distributions. Update conformance expected value for negative_binomial.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
